data.title: Gemini’s NFT platform Nifty Gateway enters immediate shutdown process
data.description:
Nifty Gateway has announced that its platform will be ceasing trading operations from today and shut down finally in February this year. It advised account holders to move their assets to external wallets or personal accounts before the deadline. With the announcement, Nifty Gateway becomes the latest upstart from the NFT era to become defunct […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nifty-gateway-enters-shutdown-process/

data.title: ETF money exits Bitcoin and Ether, flow shifts toward Solana, XRP
data.description:

data.description:

Wall Street fund managers who once ignored these stocks are now going heavy. They’re not doing […]

data.title: Stablecoins Expected to Enhance Cross-Border Business Payments
data.description: Agora's CEO Nick van Eck predicts a rise in the use of stablecoins in real-world business applications, especially for cross-border transactions. According to NS3.AI, van Eck emphasizes the importance of stablecoins in simplifying enterprise payments across various nations. This shift indicates a broader trend where stablecoins are transitioning from speculative assets to practical financial instruments for businesses.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Paid CEO Solomon $47Mn In 2025
data.description:

source: https://catenaa.com/industries/financials/goldman-sachs-paid-ceo-solomon-47mn-in-2025/

data.title: UK retail investors are right to take issue with FCA’s crypto ISAs
data.description:

data.title: Data Availability Is the Real Bottleneck Nobody Talks About
data.description:

Sequencers kept producing blocks, bridges kept taking deposits, and apps kept flashing “success. ” However, behind the scenes, independent verifiers temporarily lost access to critical transaction data
source: https://www.techgaged.com/data-availability-is-the-real-bottleneck-nobody-talks-about/
